title: Iron Vanguard
description: An endless tower-defense game: command 16 turrets and 18 heroes, unleash skills, and hold the line against 35 monster types across 2000 levels.
description_id: Game tower-defense tanpa akhir: kendalikan 16 turret dan 18 hero, lepaskan skill, dan tahan gempuran 35 jenis monster di 2000 level.
longDescription: An endless tower-defense war in the browser. Command 16 turrets and 18 unique heroes, unleash devastating skills, and hold the line against 35 monster types and giant bosses across 2000 levels.
longDescription_id: Perang tower-defense tanpa akhir di browser. Kendalikan 16 turret dan 18 hero unik, lepaskan skill dahsyat, dan pertahankan garis depan melawan 35 jenis monster dan bos raksasa di 2000 level.
highlights: Free to play in the browser

title: Blade Rush
description: A fast arcade survivor game — spin a growing ring of blades, crush endless hordes, and out-duel rival warlords.
description_id: Game arcade survivor cepat — putar cincin pisau yang terus tumbuh, hancurkan gerombolan tanpa henti, dan kalahkan panglima rival.
longDescription: A fast arcade survivor game. Spin a growing ring of blades, crush endless hordes, and out-duel rival warlords in quick, replayable runs.
longDescription_id: Game arcade survivor yang cepat. Putar cincin pisau yang terus tumbuh, hancurkan gerombolan tanpa henti, dan kalahkan panglima rival dalam ronde singkat yang bisa diulang.

title: Reconcile
description: A payment-ops puzzle game about reconciling transactions across Payment Gateway, Internal DB, and Bank Settlement — spot duplicates, refunds, and chargebacks.
description_id: Game puzzle payment-ops tentang merekonsiliasi transaksi antara Payment Gateway, DB Internal, dan Bank Settlement — temukan duplikat, refund, dan chargeback.
longDescription: A puzzle game about reconciling payment transactions across three systems — Payment Gateway, Internal DB, and Bank Settlement. Spot duplicates, partial refunds, chargebacks, and missing orders before customers riot.
longDescription_id: Game puzzle tentang merekonsiliasi transaksi pembayaran di tiga sistem — Payment Gateway, DB Internal, dan Bank Settlement. Temukan duplikat, refund sebagian, chargeback, dan order yang hilang sebelum pelanggan ribut.

title: Snakes & Ladders
description: The classic board game online for 1–4 players — single-player vs bot or pass-and-play, with modern animations and realistic sound.
description_id: Permainan papan klasik online untuk 1–4 pemain — main sendiri lawan bot atau pass-and-play, dengan animasi modern dan suara realistis.
longDescription: The classic Snakes & Ladders online for 1–4 players. Play single-player against a bot or pass-and-play with friends, with modern animations and realistic sound effects — no download required.
longDescription_id: Ular Tangga klasik online untuk 1–4 pemain. Main sendiri lawan bot atau pass-and-play bareng teman, dengan animasi modern dan efek suara realistis — tanpa perlu unduh.
highlights: No download — plays in the browser
highlights_id: Main sendiri lawan bot atau pass-and-play

title: Prize Gacha
description: An online gacha luck game — spin the gachapon, win prizes across Common to Mythic rarities, and share your wins. Plays right in the browser.
description_id: Game keberuntungan gacha online — putar gachapon, menangkan hadiah dari rarity Common sampai Mythic, dan bagikan kemenanganmu. Main langsung di browser.
longDescription: An online gacha luck game. Spin the gachapon and win prizes across Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythic rarities, then share your wins. Free, fun, and instantly playable in the browser.
longDescription_id: Game keberuntungan gacha online. Putar gachapon dan menangkan hadiah dari rarity Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, hingga Mythic, lalu bagikan kemenanganmu. Gratis, seru, dan langsung bisa dimainkan di browser.
